description: Calculate the convex hull of all populated places in Australia using the 'ne_10m_populated_places_simple' shapefile located at /home/ga/GIS_Data/natural_earth/. Filter the features where the 'SOV0NAME' field is 'Australia' to generate the hull. Export the resulting convex hull polygon as a GeoJSON file to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/australia_convex_hull.geojson using WGS84 (EPSG:4326). Calculate the area of this polygon in square kilometers and record the value in a text file at /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/australia_hull_report.txt.
